publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 178-179. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: I have little to say. I am very suffering. Such general malaise & susceptibility, but nothing to be anxious about-- excepting that there should be no more loss of blood at present.--
I am going on really well in essentials, if no drawbacks occur.
relapse. All the strength I had gained, is quite gone. So much ground to work up once again.
It is not surprising that Weddy night has left an impression of horror & distress on my mind.
Yr accounts of Lord Onslow, & also of the trespass of the horses, are very amusing & made me laugh, which is good for me.
I have less spirits than I had. And yet I really am better then I could have hoped after such a disaster.
